

# What Is Elemental Inference?
<a name="what-is"></a>

AWS Elemental Inference is a real-time service that lets you easily apply machine learning models to video, audio, and image content for automated analysis, classification, and insights generation. Features include smart crop, event clipping, and smart subtitles. Smart subtitles uses automatic speech recognition (ASR) to generate TTML subtitles from audio in your source media.
